name: CoreSleep Natural Comfort Mattress
description: A breathable natural mattress with responsive support and a calm medium feel for primary bedrooms.
longDescription: Natural Comfort is designed for buyers who want a polished everyday mattress with breathable comfort layers, balanced support and a refined visual finish. The construction is tuned for couples, growing families and shoppers moving up from mass-market foam beds into a more premium sleep setup.
features: Balanced pressure relief for mixed sleeping positions
Breathable quilted surface with softer top-hand feel
support: Best for couples, guest rooms and buyers seeking an easy medium feel.

name: CoreSleep Organic Latex Mattress
description: Layered natural latex for buoyant comfort, airflow and long-term support without a heavy sink.
longDescription: Organic Latex is positioned as a premium breathable mattress for shoppers who want natural material storytelling and resilient support. The layer stack is aimed at warmer climates, active sleepers and buyers looking for a lifted sleep feel instead of deep foam hug.
features: Durable support profile for long-term use
support: Best for back and combination sleepers who want cooler, lifted comfort.

name: CoreSleep Signature Hybrid Mattress
description: A premium hybrid designed to balance pressure relief, airflow and reinforced edge support.
longDescription: Signature Hybrid sits at the top of the storefront as a more architectural product: firmer, more structured and better suited to buyers comparing orthopedic, luxury or high-support options. It combines pocketed support, refined upholstery and a showroom-oriented finish.
material: Pocket coils with layered comfort foam
features: Structured edge support for easier movement
Pocket coil airflow and pressure balance
Luxury finish for premium bedroom positioning
support: Best for support-seeking couples and firmer sleep preferences.

name: CoreSleep Cloud Pillowtop
description: Plush top comfort with a calmer sink-in feel for side sleepers and luxury softness buyers.
longDescription: Cloud Pillowtop gives the shop a softer, more indulgent option. It is useful for merchandising comfort-led buyers, upselling to premium bedrooms and creating stronger range contrast on the listing and compare pages.
material: Pillowtop quilting with responsive support core
features: Plusher comfort for shoulders and hips
Good merchandising option for soft feel shoppers
support: Best for side sleepers and shoppers wanting a softer luxury surface.
